creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: kwm
Date: Sun Oct 14 17:14:34 UTC 2018
New revision: 482098
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/482098

Log:
  gimp-app:
  Depend on glib-networking [2], which is used for https connection.
  Fix plist when default-off options are enabled [1].
  While here overhaul dependancies.

  py-gimp:
  Fix a issue with unresolved symbols in the python library, due to incorrect linking.

  PR:		232066 [1], 232047 [2]
  Reported by:	bsd@dino.sk [1], rsmith@xs4all.nl [2]

Changes:
  head/graphics/gimp-app/Makefile
  head/graphics/gimp-app/files/patch-plug-ins_pygimp_Makefile.in
  head/graphics/gimp-app/pkg-plist
  head/graphics/py-gimp/Makefile
